---
title: "PS_AI 최적화 보고서"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 9, fig.height = 5)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(cobalt)
library(jsonlite)
library(pROC)
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) y else x

# .report_data.rds 경로 탐색: Rmd 위치 기준 → 작업디렉토리 기준
rds_paths <- c(".report_data.rds", "PS_AI/.report_data.rds")
rds_file  <- Find(file.exists, rds_paths)
if (is.null(rds_file)) {
  stop("데이터 파일이 없습니다. 먼저 source('PS_AI/optimize.R')를 실행하세요.")
}
d         <- readRDS(rds_file)
all_res   <- d$all_results
best      <- d$best_item
settings  <- d$settings
df        <- d$df
n_treat   <- d$n_treat
n_ctrl    <- d$n_ctrl
mode      <- d$mode
treat     <- d$treat
smd_cut   <- d$smd_cutoff
min_rate  <- d$min_rate
bal       <- best$bal
cfg       <- best$cfg

all_candidates <- if (length(settings$candidates) == 0) setdiff(names(df), treat) else settings$candidates
cols_cc        <- c(treat, cfg$covariates)
df_cc          <- df[complete.cases(df[, cols_cc, drop = FALSE]), ]
addl_covs      <- setdiff(all_candidates, cfg$covariates)
addl_form      <- if (length(addl_covs) > 0) reformulate(addl_covs) else NULL
```

## 요약

```{r summary_table}
eff_n <- if (!is.null(bal)) {
  if (mode == "matching") bal$matched_n else bal$effective_n
} else NA

n_treat_matched <- NA
n_ctrl_matched  <- NA
if (mode == "matching" && !is.null(best$result) && inherits(best$result, "matchit")) {
  md              <- MatchIt::match.data(best$result)
  n_treat_matched <- sum(md[[treat]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_ctrl_matched  <- sum(md[[treat]] == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
}

wsum_treat <- if (!is.null(bal)) bal$wsum_treat %||% NA else NA
wsum_ctrl  <- if (!is.null(bal)) bal$wsum_ctrl  %||% NA else NA

if (mode == "matching") {
  extra_items <- c("매칭 후 처치군 N", "매칭 후 대조군 N")
  extra_vals  <- c(
    if (!is.na(n_treat_matched)) sprintf("%d (%.0f%%)", n_treat_matched, n_treat_matched / n_treat * 100) else "N/A",
    if (!is.na(n_ctrl_matched))  sprintf("%d (%.0f%%)", n_ctrl_matched,  n_ctrl_matched  / n_ctrl  * 100) else "N/A"
  )
} else {
  ess_treat <- if (!is.null(bal)) bal$ess_treat %||% NA else NA
  ess_ctrl  <- if (!is.null(bal)) bal$ess_ctrl  %||% NA else NA
  extra_items <- c("Σw (처치군)", "Σw (대조군)")
  extra_vals  <- c(
    if (!is.na(wsum_treat)) sprintf("%d (ESS %d)", wsum_treat, ess_treat %||% NA) else "N/A",
    if (!is.na(wsum_ctrl))  sprintf("%d (ESS %d)", wsum_ctrl,  ess_ctrl  %||% NA) else "N/A"
  )
}

kable(data.frame(
  항목 = c("모드", "처치변수", "Estimand", "SMD 임계값",
           "최소 매칭율", "전체 반복 횟수", "최적 반복 회차",
           "공변량 수", "Balanced",
           extra_items, "최대 |SMD|"),
  값 = c(
    mode, treat, settings$estimand,
    settings$smd_cutoff,
    if (mode == "matching") sprintf("%.0f%%", min_rate * 100) else "N/A",
    length(all_res),
    best$iter,
    length(cfg$covariates),
    if (!is.null(bal)) if (bal$balanced) "YES ✓" else "NO ✗" else "N/A",
    extra_vals,
    if (!is.null(bal)) round(max(bal$smd, na.rm = TRUE), 4) else "N/A"
  )
), col.names = c("항목", "값"), align = c("l", "r"))
```

### 최적 공변량 목록

`r paste(cfg$covariates, collapse = ", ")`

```{r matching_params, eval=(mode == "matching")}
kable(data.frame(
  파라미터 = c("Method", "Distance", "Caliper", "Ratio"),
  값 = c(
    cfg$method   %||% "nearest",
    cfg$distance %||% "logit",
    as.character(cfg$caliper %||% "없음"),
    as.character(cfg$ratio   %||% 1)
  )
), col.names = c("파라미터", "값"))
```

```{r iptw_params, eval=(mode == "iptw")}
kable(data.frame(
  파라미터 = c("Method", "Stabilize", "Trim"),
  값 = c(
    cfg$method %||% "ps",
    as.character(isTRUE(cfg$stabilize)),
    as.character(isTRUE(cfg$trim))
  )
), col.names = c("파라미터", "값"))
```

---

## Balance Table

```{r balance_table}
if (!is.null(bal)) {
  smd_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(bal$smd),
    SMD      = round(bal$smd, 4),
    Balance  = ifelse(bal$smd < smd_cut, "OK",
                      sprintf("> %.2f", smd_cut))
  ) |> arrange(desc(SMD))

  kable(smd_df, row.names = FALSE, align = c("l", "r", "c"))
} else {
  cat("Balance 정보 없음 (분석 실패)\n")
}
```

---

## Love Plot

```{r love_plot, fig.height=7, error=TRUE}
pre_smd  <- d$pre_smd %||% setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(all_candidates)), all_candidates)
post_smd <- if (!is.null(bal)) bal$smd else setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(all_candidates)), all_candidates)

var_order <- names(pre_smd)[order(pre_smd, na.last = FALSE)]
plot_df <- rbind(
  data.frame(var = names(pre_smd),  smd = pre_smd,  sample = "Unadjusted",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE, row.names = NULL),
  data.frame(var = names(post_smd), smd = post_smd, sample = "Adjusted",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE, row.names = NULL)
)
plot_df$var <- factor(plot_df$var, levels = var_order)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = smd, y = var, color = sample)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = smd_cut, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Unadjusted" = "#F8766D", "Adjusted" = "#00BFC4"),
    breaks = c("Unadjusted", "Adjusted")
  ) +
  labs(x = "Absolute Standardized Mean Differences", y = NULL,
       color = "Sample",
       title = paste0("Love Plot (Best Config) — ", mode)) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

---

## PS Distribution

```{r ps_dist, error=TRUE}
if (!is.null(best$result) && inherits(best$result, "matchit") &&
    is.numeric(best$result$distance)) {

  md <- MatchIt::match.data(best$result)

  ps_pre <- data.frame(
    ps    = best$result$distance,
    group = factor(best$result$treat, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Control", "Treated")),
    phase = "Pre-matching"
  )
  ps_post <- data.frame(
    ps    = best$result$distance[as.integer(rownames(md))],
    group = factor(md[[treat]], levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Control", "Treated")),
    phase = "Post-matching"
  )
  ps_all       <- rbind(ps_pre, ps_post)
  ps_all$phase <- factor(ps_all$phase, levels = c("Pre-matching", "Post-matching"))

  print(
    ggplot(ps_all, aes(ps, color = group, fill = group)) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.3) +
      facet_wrap(~phase) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Control" = "#3498db", "Treated" = "#e74c3c")) +
      scale_fill_manual( values = c("Control" = "#3498db", "Treated" = "#e74c3c")) +
      labs(x = "Propensity Score", y = "Density",
           title = "PS Distribution", color = NULL, fill = NULL) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  )
} else {
  cat("PS Distribution: matching 결과 없음 또는 distance 미계산\n")
}
```

---

## ROC Curve

```{r roc_curve, fig.height=5, error=TRUE}
if (mode == "matching" && !is.null(best$result) &&
    inherits(best$result, "matchit") && is.numeric(best$result$distance)) {

  res <- best$result
  ps      <- res$distance
  treat_v <- as.integer(res$treat)

  roc_pre  <- pROC::roc(treat_v, ps, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_pre  <- pROC::ci.auc(roc_pre, method = "delong")

  md  <- MatchIt::match.data(res)
  idx <- rownames(md)
  roc_post <- pROC::roc(as.integer(res$treat[idx]), res$distance[idx], quiet = TRUE)
  auc_post <- pROC::ci.auc(roc_post, method = "delong")

  df_pre  <- as.data.frame(pROC::coords(roc_pre,  "all", ret = c("specificity","sensitivity"), transpose = FALSE))
  df_post <- as.data.frame(pROC::coords(roc_post, "all", ret = c("specificity","sensitivity"), transpose = FALSE))
  df_pre$group  <- sprintf("Pre-match  (AUC = %.3f, 95%% CI: %.3f–%.3f)", auc_pre[2],  auc_pre[1],  auc_pre[3])
  df_post$group <- sprintf("Post-match (AUC = %.3f, 95%% CI: %.3f–%.3f)", auc_post[2], auc_post[1], auc_post[3])

  print(
    ggplot(rbind(df_pre, df_post),
           aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, color = group)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato"),
                         breaks = c(df_pre$group[1], df_post$group[1])) +
      labs(x = "1 - Specificity", y = "Sensitivity",
           title = "Propensity Score ROC Curve", color = NULL) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  )
} else {
  cat("ROC Curve: matching 모드에서만 표시됩니다.\n")
}
```

---

## Delta PS

```{r delta_ps, error=TRUE}
if (mode == "matching" && !is.null(best$result) &&
    inherits(best$result, "matchit") && !is.null(best$result$match.matrix)) {

  mm     <- best$result$match.matrix
  ps_all <- best$result$distance
  all_dPS <- numeric(0)
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(mm))) {
    tid  <- rownames(mm)[j]
    cids <- mm[j, ][!is.na(mm[j, ])]
    if (length(cids) == 0) next
    all_dPS <- c(all_dPS, abs(ps_all[tid] - ps_all[cids]))
  }

  n_total <- length(all_dPS)
  n_exc   <- sum(all_dPS <= 0.01)
  n_acc   <- sum(all_dPS > 0.01 & all_dPS <= 0.1)
  n_dan   <- sum(all_dPS > 0.1)

  kable(data.frame(
    구분 = c("총 쌍", "Excellent (≤0.01)", "Acceptable (0.01–0.1)", "Danger (>0.1)"),
    개수 = c(n_total, n_exc, n_acc, n_dan),
    비율 = c("100%",
             sprintf("%.1f%%", n_exc / n_total * 100),
             sprintf("%.1f%%", n_acc / n_total * 100),
             sprintf("%.1f%%", n_dan / n_total * 100)),
    check.names = FALSE
  ), align = c("l", "r", "r"))
} else {
  cat("Delta PS: matching 모드에서만 표시됩니다.\n")
}
```

---

## 탐색 이력

```{r history_n, fig.height=4}
hist_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(all_res, function(x) {
  eff_n <- if (!is.null(x$bal)) {
    if (mode == "matching") x$bal$matched_n else x$bal$effective_n
  } else NA_integer_

  data.frame(
    iter     = x$iter,
    eff_n    = eff_n,
    max_smd  = if (!is.null(x$bal)) round(max(x$bal$smd, na.rm = TRUE), 4) else NA_real_,
    balanced = !is.null(x$bal) && x$bal$balanced
  )
}))

p1 <- ggplot(hist_df, aes(iter, eff_n, color = balanced)) +
  geom_line(color = "grey80") +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#e74c3c", "TRUE" = "#27ae60")) +
  labs(x = "Iteration",
       y = if (mode == "matching") "Matched N" else "ESS",
       title = "Search History: Sample Size",
       color = "Balanced") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
print(p1)
```

```{r history_smd, fig.height=4}
p2 <- ggplot(hist_df, aes(iter, max_smd, color = balanced)) +
  geom_line(color = "grey80") +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = smd_cut, linetype = "dashed", color = "orange", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = smd_cut + 0.01,
           label = sprintf("SMD threshold = %.2f", smd_cut),
           hjust = 0, color = "orange", size = 3.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#e74c3c", "TRUE" = "#27ae60")) +
  labs(x = "Iteration", y = "Max |SMD|",
       title = "Search History: Max |SMD|",
       color = "Balanced") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
print(p2)
```

---

## 최적 설정 JSON

```{r best_json, results='asis'}
cat("```json\n")
cat(jsonlite::toJSON(cfg, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE))
cat("\n```\n")
```

*이 설정을 PS_Explorer에 입력하거나 `PS_AI/best_result.json`을 참조하세요.*
